The Deep Desert Companion is your all-in-one solution for thriving in the Deep Desert. It contains a Deep Desert Map (with all key POIs), rotating Deep Desert loot tables and PVE guides for Testing Stations & Wrecks. Updated shortly after the reset each week.
the Deep Desert is now split into separate PVE and PVP instances
In the PVP instance of the Deep Desert,
below the map to view the different loot tables for each instance.
all of the Unique Schematics that are available from the PVE content in the Deep Desert
each week. Row A (Mk5) loot tables are at the bottom (collapsed).

Method's Overland Map shows you the various locations you can visit, including guides and loot tables for each.
all of the Unique Schematics that are available from the Overland
We've also prepared guides to help you navigate the Testing Stations in the Overland. They'll show you how long, and how challenging, each piece of content is.

keyword_hits: Greetings Sleepers. We have a large patch full of tweaks, fixes, and additions, including five new Landsraad missions! Thanks to those who sent in feedback and reports; we’ll continue to…

Greetings Sleepers. Patch 1.4.10.0 is now available on the Public Test Client. It includes new Landsraad missions, performance optimization, and several gameplay changes. We look forward to reading your feedback…
